Short description: Removes unwanted hair from Stomach
Full details:
Stomach Waxing - Rica Wax
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Waxing
- Sub heading: Rica Wax (Tin)
- Service: Stomach Waxing - Rica Wax
- Service title: Stomach Waxing - Rica Wax
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Removes unwanted hair from Stomach
- Products: Rica Wax,Waxing kit
- Approx time: 25
- Service cost: 150
- Product cost: 200
- Basic total cost: 350
- Description:
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summers, monsoon  even in winters.
    - Areas with wounds  cuts won't be waxed.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - There might be some redness on the skin post wax which will reside in a few hours.
    -  If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Professionals will provide a waxing kit (10 Wax strips, 5 Wooden spatulas, Pre-wax gel  Post wax oil) and a disposable kit (gown, bedsheet, towels, tissues etc.) to the customers.
    - Rica wax box will not be handed over.
    - If using your own product, kindly provide pre wax gel  post wax oil else extra Rs. 100/- will be charged.
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Pre-Wax Preparation: Wax station set-up followed by pre-wax gel application on body parts to be waxed.
    - Waxing: Wax application  removal.
    - Post-Wax Care: Application of post wax oil  soothing massage to calm the waxed skin.
    - Post-Service Cleanup: Disposal of items and cleanup of the service area.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    -  Moisturise your skin with a soothing moisturizer/Aloe Vera Gel to calm it.
    - Do not use harsh products (Deodorant/scrubs/bleach/detan packs) on waxed skin.
    - Avoid direct sun exposure/ hot/warm showers/ chlorinated water for a few hours.
    - Wear loose cotton clothes after waxing.

    - SPF: SPF application to protect the skin and enhance the benefits of the facial.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid this facial for sensitive skin.
    - Avoid using bleach with Peel/Detan pack.
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly. 
    - Avoid direct sunlight just after the facial.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after facial.
    - Avoid pool bath  hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - In case you wish to use your own product, please uncheck the product cost. 
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**

  - **BENEFITS**

    - Witch hazel extract helps shrink pores, soothe the skin and reduce inflammation.

    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly. 
    - Avoid direct sunlight just after clean-up.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after clean-up.

  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**

    - Tightens and lightens the skin.

    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Korean bean wax removes unwanted hair from sensitive areas gently
    - Renowned for natural soothing and emollient actions.
    - Korean bean wax is the most hygienic way of waxing 
    - Less painful than strip wax
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel, after wax lotion and wooden disposable spatula.

    - Wear loose and cotton cloth after waxing
    - Avoid hot tubs, hot baths and other chlorinated water for at least 48 hours
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Korean bean waxing. Shaving after Korean bean waxing can trigger various skin problems.

Short description: Gold helps to treat sun damage by reducing the level of melanin in the skin.
Full details:
Golden Glow Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Premium Facial
- Service: Golden Glow Facial
- Service title: Golden Glow Facial
- Service sub title: 8 Steps Facial
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Gold helps to treat sun damage by reducing the level of melanin in the skin.
- Products: Facial Essentials Kit,ODR gold facial
- Approx time: 70
- Service cost: 420
- Product cost: 699
- Basic total cost: 1119
- Description:
  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - Gold Facial Kit from Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam is used in this facial. The kit consists of mono use cleanser, lactic peel, massage gel, massage cream, cream mask, eye mask, face serum, powder face mask, sunscreen  a giveaway sheet mask.
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - All skin types except senstive skin
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Reduces wrinkles  fine lines and improves elasticity.
    - Gold helps to treat sun damage by reducing the level of melanin of the skin.
    - Almond Oil helps to soothe and nourish the skin.
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Cleansing Gel:  Face is cleansed using ODR face cleanser.
    - Lactic Peel: Peel application  removal after 5-7 minutes followed by blackhead  whitehead extraction.
    - Massage Gel: Face massage for 7-10 minutes using massage gel.
    - Massage Cream: Face, neck  back massage for 7-10 minutes using massage cream. (This step is avoided for oily skin types)
    - Cream Mask  Eye Mask:  Cream mask  eye mask application to release tension from the muscles.
    - Serum: Serum absorption into the skin.
    - Gold Powder Peel-Off Mask: Gold powder mask is mixed with water  a thick pack is applied on the face. After it dries, it is removed as a peel-off mask.
    - Sunscreen: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
    - Complimentary Gold Sheet Mask: Professional will handover the gold sheet mask to the customer for using later.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid this facial for sensitive skin.
    - Bleach is not recommended with this facial when using peel.
    - Apply peel after 30 days in case bleach used.
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly. 
    - Avoid direct sunlight just after the facial.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after facial.
    - Avoid pool bath  hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost.
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

    - Body Brightener detoxifies and soothes mind-body- spirit, pampering the body to provide one of the most luxurious, refreshing  relaxing experience.

    - Step 5: Pomegranate Serum :- Nourishes the skin and reduces the sensitivity, combats inflammation from acne breakouts.

- Gender: FEMALE

- Products: Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Bikini Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g
- Approx time: 60
- Service cost: 360
- Product cost: 389
- Basic total cost: 749
- Description:
  - **BRAND**
    - Rica Brazilian/Bean Hygiene Wax
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Sensitive areas
    - Unwanted hair on Bikini area
    - Tanned Skin
    - In growth Hair
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Brazilian (Peel-Off) wax removes unwanted hair from sensitive areas gently
    - Renowned for natural soothing and emollient actions.
    - Brazilian wax is the most hygienic way of waxing
    - Less painful than strip wax
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel
    - Use of after wax lotion
    - Use of wooden disposable spatula
    - Brazilian wax is highly recommended on sensitive areas - Bikini areas and Face
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - Use ice if you have redness and bumping
    - Use anti-biotic cream to prevent infection
    - Wear loose and cotton cloth after waxing
    - Avoid hot tubs, hot baths and other chlorinated water for at least 48 hours
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Brazilian waxing. Shaving after Brazilian waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Sweating can trigger skin problems as after waxing your skin becomes more vulnerable to skin problems. So, you should not attain exercise sessions after getting waxed.
  - **FLAVOUR**
    - Avocado Butter
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over, if left.
    - In case you wish to use your own rica wax, please uncheck the product cost.
    - If customer is not providing her own Pre Gel and Post Oil, in that case they have to pay Rs. 100/- EXTRA.
    - Make sure to add a Hygiene kit with your Bikini wax for getting silky, soft skin with utmost safety and no peril at all.

Short description: Arbutin suppresses melanin activity in the skin and helps reduce dark spots.
Full details:
O3+ Shine and Glow Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Top Selling
- Service: O3+ Shine and Glow Facial - 1 Session
- Service title: O3+ Shine and Glow Facial
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Arbutin suppresses melanin activity in the skin and helps reduce dark spots.
- Products: Facial Essentials Kit,combo- O3+ shine and glow  with sokora day and night sheet mask
- Approx time: 70
- Service cost: 420
- Product cost: 929
- Basic total cost: 1349
- Description:
  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - O3+ Light  Bright Facial Kit is used in this facial. This kit consists of mono use face cleansing foam, peel, toner, serum, massage cream, face mask  SPF.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Leaves the skin refreshed without over stimulation of the oil glands
    - Gives an Instant Glow
    - Arbutin suppresses the melanin activity in the skin and helps reduce dark spots, age spots and aging.
    - Shea Butter soothes and calms irritated skin while improving the elasticity of the skin.
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Oily/ acne-prone and combination skin except sensitive skin
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using O3+ cleansing foam.
    - Lactic Peel: Peel application  removal after 5-7 minutes followed by blackhead  whitehead extraction.
    - Purifying Tonic:  Toner is applied on the face to minimise the pores  hydrate the skin. 
    - Serum: Arbutin serum is absorbed into the skin.
    - Massage: Massage on the face, back  neck with Derma Melan Cream for 10-15 minutes to relax the muscles  release the tension.
    - Arbutin Mask Application:  Powder is mixed with water  a thick pack is applied on the face. After it dries, it is removed as a peel-off mask.
    - SPF: SPF application to protect the skin and enhance the benefits of the facial.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid this facial for sensitive skin.
    - Avoid using bleach with Peel/Detan pack
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly. 
    - Avoid direct sunlight just after the facial.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peel-off for atleast 20 days after facial.
    - Avoid pool bath  hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - In case you wish to use your own product, please uncheck the product cost. 
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

Full Body + Bikini
- Category: Salon for Women

- Sub heading: Rica Wax (Tin)
- Service: Full Body + Bikini
- Service title: Full Body + Bikini
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Removes unwanted hair from Full body and Bikini (excluding Face) Underarms and Bikini done by Sokora Bean Hygiene Wax
- Products: Rica Wax,Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Waxing kit
- Approx time: 182
- Service cost: 1092
- Product cost: 1307
- Basic total cost: 2399
- Description:
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summers, monsoon  even in winters.
    - Areas with wounds  cuts won't be waxed.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - There might be some redness on the skin post wax which will reside in a few hours.
    - Use cold compression/water to soothe the skin post wax  use anti-biotic cream/aloe-vera gel to prevent infection.
    -  Professionals will provide a waxing kit (10 Wax strips, 5 Wooden spatulas, Pre-wax gel  Post wax oil), a disposable kit (gown, bedsheet, towels, tissues etc.) and a bikini hygiene kit (1 sanitizer, 1 intimate wash, 2 gloves, 8 wooden spatulas, 2 tissues, 1 after wax aloe vera gel) to the customers.
    - Underarms  Bikini are done with Sokora Korean Bean Hygiene Wax.
    - Rica Wax box will not be handed over.
    -  If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Face wax is not included.
    - If using your own product, kindly provide pre wax gel  post wax oil else extra Rs. 100/- will be charged.
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Pre-Wax Preparation: Wax station set-up followed by pre-wax gel application on body parts to be waxed.
    - Waxing: Wax application  removal.
    - Post-Wax Care: Application of post wax oil  soothing massage to calm the waxed skin.
    - Post-Service Cleanup: Disposal of items and cleanup of the service area.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    -  Moisturise your skin with a soothing moisturizer/Aloe Vera Gel to calm it.
    - Do not use harsh products (Deodorant/scrubs/bleach/detan packs) on waxed skin.
    - Avoid direct sun exposure/ hot/warm showers/ chlorinated water for a few hours.
    - Wear loose cotton clothes after waxing.
    - Avoid exercising for a few hours as sweat can cause skin irritation.
    -  Avoid shaving post wax as it can trigger skin problems.

Short description: Orange Extracts and Rosehip Seed Oil reduce suntan and brighten the skin.

Vit-C Brightening Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Top Selling
- Service: Vit-C Brightening Facial
- Service title: Vit-C Brightening Facial
- Service sub title: 5 Steps Facial
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Orange Extracts and Rosehip Seed Oil reduce suntan and brighten the skin.
- Products: ODR brightening kit,Facial Essentials Kit
- Approx time: 65
- Service cost: 390
- Product cost: 409
- Basic total cost: 799
- Description:
  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - Vitamin C Infusion Facial Kit from Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam is used in this facial. This kit consists of mono use cleanser, peel powder, peel lotion, massage cream, face pack  face serum.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Nourishes, rejuvenates and brightens the skin
    - Provides balanced, radiant and even-toned skin.
    - Orange extract is most commonly used for skin lightening to reduce dark spots, blemishes and signs of aging.
    - Rosehip seed oil brightens the skin, prevents blackheads  whiteheads and reduces inflammation.
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Normal and combination skin
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using ODR Calming Cleanser.
    - Peel Application: Mixing of Vitamin-C Peel Powder and Brightening Peel Lotion to form a thick paste which is left on skin for 2 minutes.
    - Peel Removal: Removal of peel using a spatula  wet hands followed by blackhead  whitehead extraction.
    - Massage: Massage with Rejuvenating Massage Cream on face, back  neck for 10-15 minutes to relax the muscles  release the tension.
    - Pack: Lightening Pack application  removal after 15 minutes.
    - Serum: Serum absorption into the skin.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Bleach/De-Tan is not recommended with this facial.
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Avoid this facial for sensitive skin types.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after facial.  
    - Avoid hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
    - Apply sheet mask twice a week for better results.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost.
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

    -  Avoid shaving post wax as it can trigger skin problems.

    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Brazilian waxing. Shaving after Brazilian waxing can trigger various skin problems.

- Products: Jasmine Cirepil Roll On Wax,Biotanica Pre Gel,Biotanica Post Oil
- Approx time: 25

- Product cost: 441
- Basic total cost: 591
- Description:
  - **YES MADAM SAFETY**
    - Only one time usable products and disposable kit
    - Safe distance during services results in low risk of spreading or getting covid 19 virus.
    - Low-contact salon services for maximum hygiene - Low Contact Hygiene Roll On Waxing - one time usable only
  - **BRAND**
    - Rica Wax
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - All skin type
    - Best for dry skin
    - Tanned Skin 
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Less contact waxing
    - 100% hygienic
    - Delays the hair  growth
    - Less painful
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel and after wax lotion
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Rica cartridge refill wax will be handed over, if left.
    - Pre gel and post oil will not be handed over.
    - In case you wish to use your own products, please uncheck the product cost.
    - If customer is not providing her own Pre Gel and Post Oil, in that case they have to pay Rs. 100/- EXTRA.
    - In case, If Roll-On Rica Wax is not sufficient for your body part during services, beautician will use Normal Rica White Chocolate Wax Box. If you want to use Roll-On Rica Wax cartridge, you will have to pay EXTRA (per cartridge cost) for it.

  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - Youthful-U Skin Tightening Facial Kit from Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam is used in this facial. This kit consists of mono use cleanser, scrub, toner, serum, massage cream  face pack.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Gives skin tightening effect.
    - Gives nourishment to skin.
    - Bearberry helps attain more uniform and brighter skin complexion.
    - Wheat germ oil is a smoothing agent.
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Normal - Dry skin
    - Premature, Mature, Dry, Excessive Dry Skin
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using ODR Cleanser.
    - Scrub: Mild exfoliation using ODR Scrub followed by blackhead  whitehead extraction.
    - Toner: ODR Toner is applied to minimise the pores  hydrate the skin. 
    - Serum: ODR Serum absorption into the skin.
    - Massage: ODR Massage Cream is massaged on the face, back  neck for 10-15 minutes to relax the muscles  release the tension.
    - Face Pack: ODR Face Pack application  removal after 10 minutes.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal.
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost.
    - Steam is not included in this facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly. 
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peel-offs for atleast 20 days after facial.

Full details:
Rica Waxology + Rica Bikini
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Waxing
- Sub heading: Rica Wax (Tin)
- Service: Rica Waxology + Rica Bikini
- Service title: Rica Waxology + Rica Bikini
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Rica Waxing - Full Arms and Full Legs Sokora Bean Hygiene Waxing - Bikini Wax and Underarms
- Products: Rica Wax,Waxing kit,Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Bikini Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g
- Approx time: 117
- Service cost: 702
- Product cost: 897
- Basic total cost: 1599
- Description:
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summers, monsoon  even in winters.
    - Areas with wounds  cuts won't be waxed.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - There might be some redness on the skin post wax which will reside in a few hours.
    - Use cold compression/water to soothe the skin post wax  use anti-biotic cream/aloe-vera gel to prevent infection.
    -  Professionals will provide a waxing kit (10 Wax strips, 5 Wooden spatulas, Pre-wax gel  Post wax oil), a disposable kit (gown, bedsheet, towels, tissues etc.) and a bikini hygiene kit (1 sanitizer, 1 intimate wash, 2 gloves, 8 wooden spatulas, 2 tissues, 1 after wax aloe vera gel) to the customers.
    - Underarms  Bikini area are done with Sokora Bean Hygiene Wax.
    - Rica Wax box will not be handed over.
    -  If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Removes Unwanted hair from  Full Arms, Full Legs, Underarms, Bikini Area, Butt Line and Bikini Line
    - If using your own product, kindly provide pre wax gel  post wax oil else extra Rs. 100/- will be charged.
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Pre-Wax Preparation: Wax station set-up followed by pre-wax gel application on body parts to be waxed.
    - Waxing: Wax application  removal.
    - Post-Wax Care: Application of post wax oil  soothing massage to calm the waxed skin.
    - Post-Service Cleanup: Disposal of items and cleanup of the service area.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    -  Moisturise your skin with a soothing moisturizer/Aloe Vera Gel to calm it.
    - Do not use harsh products (Deodorant/scrubs/bleach/detan packs) on waxed skin.
    - Avoid direct sun exposure/ hot/warm showers/ chlorinated water for a few hours.
    - Wear loose cotton clothes after waxing.
    - Avoid exercising for a few hours as sweat can cause skin irritation.
    -  Avoid shaving post wax as it can trigger skin problems.

    - Renowned for  natural soothing and emollient actions.

  - **THINGS TO KNOW**

    - Avoid hot tubs, hot baths and other chlorinated water for at least 48 hours
    - Use ice if you have redness and bumping
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Brazilian waxing. Shaving after Brazilian waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Sweating can trigger skin problems as after waxing your skin becomes more vulnerable to skin problems. So, you should not attain exercise sessions after getting waxed.

    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over, if left.

    - Make sure to add a Hygiene kit with your Bikini wax for getting silky, soft skin with utmost safety and no peril at all.

  - **BRAND**

  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Soak Preparation: Mani-pedi station setup with all tools and mixing salt  soap in the tub for soak.
    - Cut  File: Removal of old nail polish followed by filing/cutting nails.
    - Soak: Cuticle softner cream application on nails followed by soaking hands/feet in warm water for 5 minutes.
    - Cuticle Care  Cleansing: Cuticle trimming followed by cleaning hands/feet till elbow/legs.
    - Feet Scrapping: After drying feet  legs, feet are scrapped using the exfoliating scrapper.
    - Exfoliation: Scrubbing hands/feet till elbows/knees using the scrub to exfoliate the skin and remove dead skin.
    - Massage: Relaxing massage for 7-10 minutes to release muscle tension.
    - Pack, Buff  Nail paint Application: Pack application till knees followed by buffing the nails  nail paint application.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Good in lightening, hydrating and locking moisture into the skin.
    - Softens crack heels.
    - Nourishes and hydrates the skin.
    - Exfoliates dull layers of dead skin on hands and feet.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Organica Da Roma mono sachets will be used and left over products will be handed over.
    - One box of product will be used for both pedicure and manicure.
    - Avoid getting pedicure if you have any injury or infection on your feet.
    - If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Our professionals carry 7 basic shades of nailpaints. You can choose either from them or ask the professional to apply your nailpaint.
    - If your feet are more dry and cracked, it'll take min 2/3 sittings of pedicures to get rid of it completely.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Use a good hand/foot cream regularly. Massage your cuticles with a cuticle oil for nourishment.
    - Trim your long nails regularly to prevent  breakage.

Short description: Removes unwanted hair from lower lips
Full details:
Lower Lips - Face Waxing
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Waxing
- Sub heading: Face Wax
- Service: Lower Lips - Face Waxing
- Service title: Lower Lips - Face Waxing
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Removes unwanted hair from lower lips
- Products: Face and Underarm Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g Combo
- Approx time: 5
- Service cost: 30
- Product cost: 35
- Basic total cost: 65
- Description:
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summers, monsoon  even in winters.
    - Areas with wounds  cuts won't be waxed.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - There might be some redness on the skin post wax which will reside in a few hours.
    -  Professionals will provide a waxing kit (10 Wax strips, 5 Wooden spatulas, Pre-wax gel  Post wax oil) and a disposable kit (gown, bedsheet, towels, tissues etc.) to the customers.
    - Rica Wax box will not be handed over.
    -  If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - If using your own product, kindly provide pre wax gel  post wax oil else extra Rs. 50/- will be charged.
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Pre-Wax Preparation: Wax station set-up followed by pre-wax gel application on area to be waxed.
    - Waxing: Wax application  removal.
    - Post-Wax Care: Application of post wax oil  soothing massage to calm the waxed skin.
    - Post-Service Cleanup: Disposal of items and cleanup of the service area.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Wash your face with cold water.
    - Apply Aloe Vera Gel to soothe the newly waxed skin.
    - Avoid using harsh products like scrub, peel, etc. for 1-2 days.

Berry Bomb Ice Cream Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Premium Facial
- Service: Berry Bomb Ice Cream Facial
- Service title: Berry Bomb Ice Cream Facial
- Service sub title: 7 Steps Facial
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Blueberry Extract, source of pro-retinol, reduces signs of ageing and dark spots.
- Products: Facial Essentials Kit,ODR Ice cream facial kit
- Approx time: 65
- Service cost: 390
- Product cost: 759
- Basic total cost: 1149
- Description:
  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - Berry Bomb Ice Cream Facial from Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam is used in this facial. The kit consists of mono use cleanser, exfoliator, massage gel, massage cream, algae mask powder, algae mask gel, tonic spray  SPF.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Even skin tone  luminous glow.
    - Tightens and lightens the skin.
    - Berry Bomb Ice Cream Rubber Mask provides cooling effect which helps release stress from the skin.
    - Blue Berry extract is a source of pro-retinol which helps in reducing the apperance of signs of aging and dark spots. 
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Normal - Dry Skin
    - Dry, dull, dehydrated, premature and mature skin
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using ODR Ice Cream cleanser.
    - Exfoliator: Mild exfoliation using ODR Scrub followed by blackhead  whitehead extraction.
    - Massage Gel: Face massage for 5 minutes using ODR Massage Gel.
    - Massage Cream: Massage on the face, back  neck for 10-15 minutes to relax the muscles  release the tension.
    - Algae Mask:  Algae Mask Powder is mixed with Algae Gel to make a thick paste which is then applied on the face.
    - Tonic Spray: After the Algae mask is peeled-off, toner is sprayed on face to minimise the pores and hydrate the skin.
    - SPF:  SPF application to protect the skin and enhance the benefits of the facial.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost.
    - Steam is not included in this facial.
    - This facial can be done with bleach and detan pack.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.  
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after facial.
    -  Avoid hot shower for atleast 24 hours. 
    -  Apply sheet mask twice a week for better results.

Short description: 6 steps in the kit Lightens and brightens skin tone
Full details:
Ice Cream Pedicure
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Mani-Pedi
- Sub heading: Pedicure
- Service: Ice Cream Pedicure
- Service title: Ice Cream Pedicure
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: 6 steps in the kit Lightens and brightens skin tone
- Products: ODR Ice Cream Mani-Pedi Kit
- Approx time: 50
- Service cost: 300
- Product cost: 299
- Basic total cost: 599
- Description:
  - **BRAND**
    - Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Soak Preparation: Pedicure station setup with all tools and mixing salt  soap in the tub for soak.
    - Cut  File: Removal of old nail polish followed by filing/cutting toe nails.
    - Soak: Cuticle softner cream application on nails followed by soaking feet in warm water for 5 minutes.
    - Cuticle Care  Cleansing: Cuticle trimming followed by cleaning feet till legs.
    - Feet Scrapping: After drying feet  legs, feet are scrapped using the exfoliating scrapper.
    - Exfoliation: Scrubbing feet till knees using the scrub to exfoliate the skin and remove dead skin.
    - Massage: Relaxing massage for 7-10 minutes to release muscle tension.
    - Pack, Buff  Nailpaint Application: Pack application till knees followed by buffing the nails  nail paint application.
  - **NEW: CALLUS REMOVER**
    - Professional will use electric callus remover on your feet to repair cracked heels  remove rigid callus. It is painless and quick in comparision to feet scrapper.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Good in lightening, hydrating and locking moisture into the skin.
    - Softens the crack heels
    - Nourishes and hydrates the skin 
    - Exfoliates dull layers of dead skin on feet.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Organica Da Roma mono sachets will be used and left over products will be handed over.
    - Avoid getting pedicure if you have any injury or infection on your feet.
    - If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Our professionals carry 7 basic shades of nailpaints. You can choose either from them or ask the professional to apply your nailpaint.
    - If your feet are more dry and cracked, it'll take min 2-3 sittings of pedicures to get rid of it completely.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Use a good foot cream regularly. Massage your cuticles with a cuticle oil for nourishment.
    - Trim your long nails regularly to prevent  breakage.

Short description: Kumkumadi Extract helps to lighten dark spots and Saffron promotes clear skin.
Full details:
Kumkumadi Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Ayurvedic Facial
- Service: Kumkumadi Facial
- Service title: Kumkumadi Facial
- Service sub title: 8 Steps Facial
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Kumkumadi Extract helps to lighten dark spots and Saffron promotes clear skin.
- Products: Facial Essentials Kit,ODR Kumkumadi Facial
- Approx time: 65
- Service cost: 390
- Product cost: 959
- Basic total cost: 1349
- Description:
  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - Kumkumadi Facial Kit from Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam is used in this facial. The kit consists of mono use detan pack, cleanser, exfoliator, tonic spray, massage gel, massage cream, face mask  a serum sheet mask.
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Good in hydration and reduction of tan.
    - Improves the skin texture and blood circulation.
    - The Lep in this facial helps stimulate damaged cells, reduces acne and lightens the acne scars. 
    -  The Pomegranate Detan pack has Pomegranate extracts and Kojic Acid which help in reducing scars  to even skin tone. 
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - For all skin types except sensitive skin
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Detan Pack: ODR detan pack application with a spatula.
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using ODR face cleanser.
    - Exfoliator: Mild exfoliation using ODR scrub.
    - Tonic Spray: Toner application to minimise the pores  hydrate the skin.
    - Massage Gel: Face massage for 5 minutes using ODR massage gel.
    - Massage Cream: ODR massage cream is massaged on the face, back  neck for 10-15 minutes to relax the muscles  release the tension.
    - Face Mask (Lep): Face mask (lep) is applied  left for 10 minutes to dry, then wiped off using a wet tissue.
    - Sheet Mask:  Tablet sheet mask is soaked in Kumkumadi serum and then applied on face to give skin a boost of moisture.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid Bleach/ Detan with this facial.
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal.
    -  Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after facial. 
    - Avoid hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost.
    - Steam is not included in this facial.
    - The detan pack provided in the kit is also safe on sensitive, dry, oily, combination and acne-prone skin.

Perfect Touch
- Category: Salon for Women

- Service title: Perfect Touch
- Service sub title: Wax It + Bikini + Sara Facial + Mani + Pedi + Face Bleach + Sheet Mask + Head Massage
- Gender: FEMALEMALE
- Short description: Normal Honey Chocolate Waxing - Full Arms, Full Legs and Underarms Normal Honey Chocolate Waxing - Bikini Wax Sara Gold Facial by O3+ Classic - Manicure Classic - Pedicure Oxy Bleach - (Face and Neck) Kumkumadi Face Sheet Mask Head Massage (15 mins) Threading - Eyebrows, Upper Lips and Forehead
- Products: Sokora Day And Night Sheet Mask,Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Waxing kit,Honey Gold Aloevera Wax,Facial Essentials Kit,ODR gold facial ,ODR O2 Bleach - Face,Fyc Hair Oil 15ml,Fyc Classic Mani-Pedi
- Approx time: 280
- Service cost: 1680
- Product cost: 1469
- Basic total cost: 3149
- Description:
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachet will be used.
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Moisturize your skin well after the waxing session.
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed and thread.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Bikini waxing. Shaving after Bikini waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Sweating can trigger skin problems as after waxing your skin becomes more vulnerable to skin problems. So, you should not attain exercise sessions after getting waxed.
    - Steam is not included in facial.
    - Always apply sunscreen (of at least an SPF 25) after a skin lightening facial.
    - Tingling sensation can be felt on the area bleach/de-tan is applied. It can vary from person-to-person.
    - Avoid getting a manicure/pedicure done if your hands/feet have any recent cuts, wounds, injury or fungal infection
    - If your feet is more dry and cracked, it'll take min 2/3 sittings of pedicures to get rid of it completely.
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Products will be handed over, if left.
    - In case you wish to use your own product, please uncheck the product cost.
    - Remaining handover wax (mentioned in app) should be used within 20-25 days.
    - Normal Wax Box will be handed over, if left.
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over while upgrading from Normal to Rica Wax.
    - Once the lid of honey chocolate wax box is opened it can be used only for two waxing services.
    - While using your own product, you have to provide the product for FREE Bikini Wax too.
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over while upgrading from Normal to Rica Wax.
    - Make sure to add a Hygiene kit with your Bikini wax for getting silky, soft skin with utmost safety and no peril at all.
    - Our Beauticians carry only 7 basic shades of high quality Nail Paints that you can choose from.
    - If you prefer using your own nail paint, our beautician will gladly apply.
  - **PRECAUTION**
    - Bleach is not recommended with this facial when using Sara Gold Peel-Off Mask.

    - REVIVES NATURAL GLOW: Get a salon-like glow from the comfort of your home. The 6-step Ubtan Facial Kit restores your skin's glow with the natural care of Turmeric  Saffron.
    - IMPROVES SKIN TEXTURE: Say yes to the smoother and even-toned skin with the Ubtan Facial Kit that removes dead skin cells, hydrates, and rejuvenates your skin.

- Approx time: 160
- Service cost: 960
- Product cost: 1375
- Basic total cost: 2335
- Description:
  - **RECOMMENDED WHEN**
    - 1 day before Marriage
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Use of mono sachets
    - Always apply sunscreen (of at least an SPF 25) after a skin lightening facial.
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Moisturize your skin well after the waxing session.
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - Steam is not included in facial.
    - Hair wash is not included with the head massage.
    - Don't bleach the area to be waxed on the same day before waxing.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Oxy bleach,de-tan or peel either of these products can be clubbed with gold facial.
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Mono sachets will be handed over, if left.
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over.
    - In case you wish to use your own product, please uncheck the product cost.
    - If customer is not providing her own Pre Gel and Post Oil, in that case they have to pay Rs. 100/- EXTRA.

The Bee Wax - FREE Honey Bikini Wax
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: FREE Waxing
- Sub heading: FREE Bikini Wax
- Service: The Bee Wax - FREE Honey Bikini Wax (Waxing + Bikini Wax + Pedicure + Bleach + Threading)
- Service title: The Bee Wax - FREE Honey Bikini Wax
- Service sub title: Waxing + Bikini Wax + Pedicure + Bleach + Threading
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: FREE Honey Aloe-Vera Waxing - Bikini Wax Honey Aloe-Vera Waxing - Full Arms, Full Legs and Underarms Classic Pedicure O2 Bleach - (Face and Neck) Threading - Eyebrows and Upper Lips
- Products: Fyc Classic Mani-Pedi,Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Waxing kit,Honey Gold Aloevera Wax,ODR O2 Bleach - Face
- Approx time: 145
- Service cost: 870
- Product cost: 522
- Basic total cost: 1392
- Description:
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Moisturize your skin well after the waxing session.
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed and thread.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - Mono sachet will be used.
    - Avoid using bleach with peel or detan pack.
    - Skin of the area to be thread should not be too loose, else chances of cuts are too high.
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Bikini waxing. Shaving after Bikini waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Avoid getting a pedicure done if your feet have any recent cuts, wounds, injury or fungal infection
    - If your feet is more dry and cracked, it'll take min 2/3 sittings of pedicures to get rid of it completely.
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Normal Wax Box will be handed over, if left.
    - In case you wish to use your own product, please uncheck the product cost.
    - Remaining handover wax (mentioned in app) should be used within 20-25 days.
    - Once the lid of honey chocolate wax box is opened, it can be used only for two waxing services.
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over while upgrading from Normal to Rica Wax.
    - Make sure to add a Hygiene kit with your Bikini wax for getting silky, soft skin with utmost safety and no peril at all.
    - Our Beauticians carry only 7 basic shades of high quality Nail Paints that you can choose from.
    - If you prefer using your own nail paint, our beautician will gladly apply. ADD TO CART

    - Exfoliation

    - Spa like ambience at home

    - Mono-dose products for maximum transparency
    - Safe spa experience at the comfort of your home

Short description: Removes Unwanted hair from Bikini Area, Butt Line and Bikini Line
Full details:
Rica Bean Hygiene Bikini Wax
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Hair
- Sub heading: Add On
- Service: Rica Bean Hygiene Bikini Wax
- Service title: Rica Bean Hygiene Bikini Wax
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Removes Unwanted hair from Bikini Area, Butt Line and Bikini Line
- Products: Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Bikini Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g
- Approx time: 60
- Service cost: 360
- Product cost: 389
- Basic total cost: 749
- Description:
  - **BRAND**
    - Rica Brazilian/Bean Hygiene Wax
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Sensitive areas
    - Unwanted hair on Bikini area
    - Tanned Skin
    - In growth Hair
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Brazilian (Peel-Off) wax removes unwanted hair from sensitive areas gently
    - Renowned for natural soothing and emollient actions.
    - Brazilian wax is the most hygienic way of waxing
    - Less painful than strip wax
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel
    - Use of after wax lotion
    - Use of wooden disposable spatula
    - Brazilian wax is highly recommended on sensitive areas - Bikini areas and Face
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - Use ice if you have redness and bumping
    - Use anti-biotic cream to prevent infection
    - Wear loose and cotton cloth after waxing
    - Avoid hot tubs, hot baths and other chlorinated water for at least 48 hours
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Brazilian waxing. Shaving after Brazilian waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Sweating can trigger skin problems as after waxing your skin becomes more vulnerable to skin problems. So, you should not attain exercise sessions after getting waxed.
  - **FLAVOUR**
    - Avocado Butter
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over, if left.
    - In case you wish to use your own rica wax, please uncheck the product cost.
    - If customer is not providing her own Pre Gel and Post Oil, in that case they have to pay Rs. 100/- EXTRA.
    - Make sure to add a Hygiene kit with your Bikini wax for getting silky, soft skin with utmost safety and no peril at all.

Short description: Authentic Korean ingredients brighten and whiten the skin
Full details:
Stripless Korean Bikini Wax
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Add On
- Service: Stripless Korean Bikini Wax
- Service title: Stripless Korean Bikini Wax
- Service sub title: One-Time Use Peel-Off Wax
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Authentic Korean ingredients brighten and whiten the skin
- Products: Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit,Bikini Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g
- Approx time: 60
- Service cost: 360
- Product cost: 389
- Basic total cost: 749
- Description:
  - **BRAND**
    - Rica Brazilian/Bean Hygiene Wax
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Sensitive areas
    - Unwanted hair on Bikini area
    - Tanned Skin
    - In growth Hair
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Brazilian (Peel-Off) wax removes unwanted hair from sensitive areas gently
    - Renowned for natural soothing and emollient actions.
    - Brazilian wax is the most hygienic way of waxing
    - Less painful than strip wax
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel
    - Use of after wax lotion
    - Use of wooden disposable spatula
    - Brazilian wax is highly recommended on sensitive areas - Bikini areas and Face
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - Use ice if you have redness and bumping
    - Use anti-biotic cream to prevent infection
    - Wear loose and cotton cloth after waxing
    - Avoid hot tubs, hot baths and other chlorinated water for at least 48 hours
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Brazilian waxing. Shaving after Brazilian waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Sweating can trigger skin problems as after waxing your skin becomes more vulnerable to skin problems. So, you should not attain exercise sessions after getting waxed.
  - **FLAVOUR**
    - Avocado Butter
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over, if left.
    - In case you wish to use your own rica wax, please uncheck the product cost.
    - If customer is not providing her own Pre Gel and Post Oil, in that case they have to pay Rs. 100/- EXTRA.
    - Make sure to add a Hygiene kit with your Bikini wax for getting silky, soft skin with utmost safety and no peril at all.

Short description: Removes unwanted hair from upper lips
Full details:
Upper Lips - Waxing
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Facial
- Sub heading: Add On
- Service: Upper Lips - Waxing
- Service title: Upper Lips - Waxing
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Removes unwanted hair from upper lips
- Products: Face and Underarm Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g Combo
- Approx time: 5
- Service cost: 30
- Product cost: 39
- Basic total cost: 69
- Description:
  - **BRAND**
    - Rica Brazilian
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Sensitive areas 
    - Unwanted hair on upper lips
    - Tanned Skin 
    - In growth Hair
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Renowned for  natural soothing and emollient actions.
    - Removes unwanted hair from upper lips
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel
    - Use of after wax lotion
    - Use of wooden disposable spatula
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - If getting waxed for the first time : possibility of getting redness / hives / inflammation is normal, which subsides in few hours to few days depending on person to person.
    - Use ice if you have redness and bumping
    - Use anti-biotic cream to prevent infection
  - **FLAVOUR**
    - Avocado Butter
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Rica Wax Box will not be handed over, if left.
    - In case you wish to use your own rica wax, please uncheck the product cost. 
    - If customer is not providing her own Pre Gel and Post Oil, in that case they have to pay Rs. 50/- EXTRA.

    - Melting Massage Candle: Melted candle wax is massaged over neck  back. (The wax is not to be used on the face  it does not burn the skin.)
    - Cream Pack: Pack application using facial brush for 10-15 minutes.
    - 2-in-1 Eye Mask  Face Serum: Eye mask is applied under the eyes followed by application of leftover serum.
    - Algae Peel-Off Powder, Gel  Herbs: Powder mask, gel mask and herbs are mixed together to make a rubber mask which is then applied all over the face. It is removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - Sunscreen: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
    - Lip Balm: Lip balm application to moisturise lips. 
    - Facial Brush: Handover Professional will handover the facial brush to the customer.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid using bleach or detan pack with peel.
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.
    - Avoid direct sunlight after facial.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peel for atleast 20 days after facial. 
    - Avoid hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial  left over products will be handed over.  
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost. 
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

    - Laser Shots: Laser shots are given on the targetted area.
    - Wiping  Treatment: Target area is wiped with a wet tissue followed by post laser ointment  sunscreen application.
  - **Why Laser Hair Reduction**
    - 80%-90% hair growth reduction over time.
    - Reduces skin irritation and allergic reactions associated with traditional hair removal methods.
    - Painless hair removal method
    - Long term results in comparision to traditional hair removal methods.
  - **Precautions**
    - If you have a tattoo, cover the area before starting the process.
    - Avoid treatment on Vitiligo affected areas.
    - In case of metal implants, use gauze or avoid treatment on the area.
    - Avoid treatment on henna-stained skin.
    - Avoid taking this treatment if you're pregnant.
    - Avoid this treatment if you're lactating, during the first 6 months.
    - Avoid lasers on active acne.
    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.
  - **Post Care**
    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.
    - Avoid direct sun for 3-4 days.
    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

    - Marking: Area is marked with pencil.
    - Cleansing  Shaving: Area is cleansed followed by shaving.
    - Marking: Area is marked again followed by ECG Gel application.
    - Laser Shots: Laser shots are given on the targetted area.
    - Wiping  Treatment: Target area is wiped with a wet tissue followed by post laser ointment  sunscreen application.
  - **Why Laser Hair Reduction**
    - 80%-90% hair growth reduction over time.
    - Reduces skin irritation and allergic reactions associated with traditional hair removal methods.
    - Painless hair removal method
    - Long term results in comparision to traditional hair removal methods.
  - **Precautions**
    - If you have a tattoo, cover the area before starting the process.
    - Avoid treatment on Vitiligo affected areas.
    - In case of metal implants, use gauze or avoid treatment on the area.
    - Avoid treatment on henna-stained skin.
    - Avoid taking this treatment if you're pregnant.
    - Avoid this treatment if you're lactating, during the first 6 months.
    - Avoid lasers on active acne.
    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.
  - **Post Care**
    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.
    - Avoid direct sun for 3-4 days.
    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

    - Avoid taking this treatment if you're pregnant.
    - Avoid this treatment if you're lactating, during the first 6 months.
    - Avoid lasers on active acne.
    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.
  - **Post Care**
    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.
    - Avoid direct sun for 3-4 days.
    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

- Short description: Red Algae revitalize the skin barrier, Korean Ginseng unclogs pores, and Rice Water gives a glassy finish. Threading is complimentary with this service
- Products: Korean Clean Up
- Approx time: 60
- Service cost: 360
- Product cost: 399
- Basic total cost: 759
- Description:
  - **Products used **
    - Glossy Clear Skin Korean Luxe Face Clean-Up Kit from Organica Da Roma by YesMadam is used. This kit consists of a mono-use cleanser, exfoliator, sheet mask (eye+nose+lip), hydrogel, glow massage cream, two cream masks, and SPF. 
  - **Benefits **
    - Helps protect the skin barrier without stripping its natural moisture
    - Unclogs pores and tightens the skin
    - Provides a glassy finish.
    - Delivers deep hydration and moisturization
  - **Procedure**
    - Cleansing- Face is cleansed using Rice Radiance Cleanser for 2-3 minutes. 
    - Exfoliating- Mild exfoliation using Ginpure Glow Exfoliating Scrub and face brush for 2-3 minutes followed by whiteheads and blackheads extraction.
    - Sheet Masks- Application of Moisture Melody Sheet Masks to eyes, nose, and lips for 5 minutes. 
    - Massage Gel - Face massage using Red-Algae Vive Hydrogel for 2-3 minutes.
    - Massage cream- Marine Glow Cream is massaged on the face and neck for 3-5 minutes to release tension. (Back massage is not included) 
    - Face Mask - Application of Glow-Boosting Mask 1 to one side of the face and Mask 2 to the other.
    - Sunscreen- Finish with sunscreen application. 
  - **Things to Know**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost.
    - Professionals bring disposables to ensure hygiene.
  - **Aftercare tips **
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.
    - Avoid direct sunlight right after the clean-up.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days.
    - Avoid hot shower or swimming for atleast 24 hours.
    - Repeat the clean-up every 15 days to maintain glass skin.
  - **Precautions **
    - Avoid this service if you have any cuts or burns.

ID: Full Body Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
Service title: Full Body Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
Short description: Multiple sessions at a discounted price
Full details:
Full Body Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
- Category: Laser Treatments
- Sub category: Laser Hair Reduction
- Sub heading: Super Saver Packages
- Service: Full Body Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
- Service title: Full Body Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Multiple sessions at a discounted price
- Products: Razors,ECG Gel,ODR Cleansing Milk
- Approx time: 180
- Service cost: 5400
- Product cost: 2081
- Basic total cost: 7481
- Description:
  - **Procedure**
    - Marking: Area is marked with pencil.
    - Cleansing  Shaving: Area is cleansed followed by shaving.
    - Marking: Area is marked again followed by ECG Gel application.
    - Laser Shots: Laser shots are given on the targetted area.
    - Wiping  Treatment: Target area is wiped with a wet tissue followed by post laser ointment  sunscreen application.
  - **Why Laser Hair Reduction**
    - 80%-90% hair growth reduction over time.
    - Reduces skin irritation and allergic reactions associated with traditional hair removal methods.
    - Painless hair removal method
    - Long term results in comparision to traditional hair removal methods.
  - **Precautions**
    - If you have a tattoo, cover the area before starting the process.
    - Avoid treatment on Vitiligo affected areas.
    - In case of metal implants, use gauze or avoid treatment on the area.
    - Avoid treatment on henna-stained skin.
    - Avoid taking this treatment if you're pregnant.
    - Avoid this treatment if you're lactating, during the first 6 months.
    - Avoid lasers on active acne.
    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.
  - **Post Care**
    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.
    - Avoid direct sun for 3-4 days.
    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

- Sub category: Laser Hair Reduction
- Sub heading: Super Saver Packages
- Service: Sidelocks Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
- Service title: Sidelocks Laser Hair Reduction - 3 Sessions
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Above mentioned price is for 3 sessions and for same time duration Please keep gap of atleast 21 days in between sessions or schedule sessions as per your hair growth
- Products: ODR Cleansing Milk,Razors,ECG Gel
- Approx time: 30
- Service cost: 900
- Product cost: 270
- Basic total cost: 1170
- Description:
  - **Procedure**
    - Marking: Area is marked with pencil.
    - Cleansing  Shaving: Area is cleansed followed by shaving.
    - Marking: Area is marked again followed by ECG Gel application.
    - Laser Shots: Laser shots are given on the targetted area.
    - Wiping  Treatment: Target area is wiped with a wet tissue followed by post laser ointment  sunscreen application.
  - **Why Laser Hair Reduction**
    - 80%-90% hair growth reduction over time.
    - Reduces skin irritation and allergic reactions associated with traditional hair removal methods.
    - Painless hair removal method
    - Long term results in comparision to traditional hair removal methods.
  - **Precautions**
    - If you have a tattoo, cover the area before starting the process.
    - Avoid treatment on Vitiligo affected areas.
    - In case of metal implants, use gauze or avoid treatment on the area.
    - Avoid treatment on henna-stained skin.
    - Avoid taking this treatment if you're pregnant.
    - Avoid this treatment if you're lactating, during the first 6 months.
    - Avoid lasers on active acne.
    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.
  - **Post Care**
    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.
    - Avoid direct sun for 3-4 days.
    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

    - Wiping  Treatment: Target area is wiped with a wet tissue followed by post laser ointment  sunscreen application.
  - **Why Laser Hair Reduction**
    - 80%-90% hair growth reduction over time.
    - Reduces skin irritation and allergic reactions associated with traditional hair removal methods.
    - Painless hair removal method
    - Long term results in comparision to traditional hair removal methods.
  - **Precautions**
    - If you have a tattoo, cover the area before starting the process.
    - Avoid treatment on Vitiligo affected areas.
    - In case of metal implants, use gauze or avoid treatment on the area.
    - Avoid treatment on henna-stained skin.

    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.

    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.

    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

Short description: 7 steps combining advance equipments like Q - Switch Laser, Ultrasonic, and LED mask.
Full details:
Derma Revive Facial
- Category: Laser Treatments
- Sub category: Laser Body Polishing
- Sub heading: Recommended For You
- Service: Derma Revive Facial
- Service title: Derma Revive Facial
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: 7 steps combining advance equipments like Q - Switch Laser, Ultrasonic, and LED mask.
- Products: Carbon Peel,Facial Essentials Kit,ECG Gel,ODR Marine Algae Peel Off Gel Mask,ODR Massage Cream Combo
- Approx time: 90
- Service cost: 2700
- Product cost: 649
- Basic total cost: 3349
- Description:
  - **Benefits**
    - Stimulates collagen production
    - Fades acne scars  improves skin texture
    - Reduces pigmentation to even skin tone
  - **Procedure**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed to remove impurities from upper layers.
    - Carbon Peel: Carbon peel application to remove impurities from pores  absorbs extra oil.
    - Carbon Shots: Laser shots are given which essentially reduce enlarged pores  shrink sebaceous glands
    - Laser Toning: This stimulates collagen production which makes the skin soft and supple.
    - ECG Gel: Ultrasonic waves are given with ECG gel application.
    - Mask: Hydration Mask application which includes LED light therapy for skin.
    - Sunscreen Application: Facial is finished off with Sunscreen Application to protect skin.
  - **Pre Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants for 2-3 days prior getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing for 24-48 hours prior getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Do not apply makeup on the day of facial.
    - Avoid heavy meal  alchohol.
  - **Post Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants for 2-3 days after getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing for 24-48 hours after getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Only use a mild cleanser on face.
    - Do not apply makeup for atleast 24 hours post facial.
    - Avoid touching face or washing with hot water.
    - Sweat might cause skin irritation, hence avoid workout post facial.
  - **Precautions**
    - Avoid Laser Facials if you are pregnant, breast feeding, have teeth braces, had eye surgery or undergone any surgery recently. In such cases consult your doctor before getting hydra facial.

Short description: 10 steps in the kit Free cleansing brush included
Full details:
Korean Luxe Pedicure
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Mani-Pedi
- Sub heading: Pedicure
- Service: Korean Luxe Pedicure
- Service title: Korean Luxe Pedicure
- Service sub title: 9 steps | Free silicone brush
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: 10 steps in the kit Free cleansing brush included
- Products: Sokora Korean Mani- Pedi Kit
- Approx time: 70
- Service cost: 420
- Product cost: 339
- Basic total cost: 759
- Description:
  - **Procedure**
    - Cut  File: Removal of old nail paint followed by filing/cutting nails.
    - Cuticle Scrub  Soak: Cuticle scrub application on all nails followed by dipping feet in jelly soak.
    - Cuticle Care  Cleansing: Cuticle trimming followed by cleansing feet using brush.
    - Callus Softening Peel: Peel application on legs followed by mild exfoliation.
    - Callus Remover/ Scraping: Dead skin removal using either callus remover or feet scraper for soft  smooth heels.
    - Candle Massage: 10-minute relaxing massage with melted candle.
    - Peel-Off Rubber Mask  Cream Mask: Rubber mask application on feet and cream mask application on legs.
    - Shoulder Massage: Relaxing shoulder massage is given till the mask dries.
    - Nail Paint Application: Nail paint application on feet.
    - Foot Cream: Foot cream application for extra nourishment.
  - **Benefits**
    - Removes dead skin cells
    - Nourishes  locks moisture in the skin
    - Brightens skin and removes tan
  - **Things to know**
    - One-time use products will be used.
    - Leftover products will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Our professionals only carry 7 basic shades of nailpaints. If you wish to apply your own nailpaint, they will gladly apply.
  - **Precautions  Aftercare**
    - Avoid getting pedicure done if you have any infection/ injury on your feet.
    - If your feet are excessively dry or cracked, it'll take a couple of sittings to have smooth  supple feet.
    - Use a good foot cream regularly.
    - Massage your cuticles with cuticle oil for nourishment.
    - Trim your long nails regularly to prevent breakage.

Short description: 80%- 90% reduction in hair growth over 6 or more sessions depending on your body, medical history and hormones.
Full details:
Bikini Line Laser Hair Reduction
- Category: Laser Treatments
- Sub category: Laser Body Polishing
- Sub heading: Recommended For You
- Service: Bikini Line Laser Hair Reduction
- Service title: Bikini Line Laser Hair Reduction
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: 80%- 90% reduction in hair growth over 6 or more sessions depending on your body, medical history and hormones.
- Products: ECG Gel,Razors,ODR Cleansing Milk
- Approx time: 45
- Service cost: 1350
- Product cost: 270
- Basic total cost: 1620
- Description:
  - **Procedure**
    - Marking: Area is marked with pencil.
    - Cleansing  Shaving: Area is cleansed followed by shaving.
    - Marking: Area is marked again followed by ECG Gel application.
    - Laser Shots: Laser shots are given on the targetted area.
    - Wiping  Treatment: Target area is wiped with a wet tissue followed by post laser ointment  sunscreen application.
  - **Why Laser Hair Reduction**
    - 80%-90% hair growth reduction over time.
    - Reduces skin irritation and allergic reactions associated with traditional hair removal methods.
    - Painless hair removal method
    - Long term results in comparision to traditional hair removal methods.
  - **Precautions**
    - If you have a tattoo, cover the area before starting the process.
    - Avoid treatment on Vitiligo affected areas.
    - In case of metal implants, use gauze or avoid treatment on the area.
    - Avoid treatment on henna-stained skin.
    - Avoid taking this treatment if you're pregnant.
    - Avoid this treatment if you're lactating, during the first 6 months.
    - Avoid lasers on active acne.
    - Avoid laser treatment on birthmarks.
    - Avoid laser treatments on areas with moles or warts.
    - Avoid laser treatments on deep pigmentation spots.
    - Avoid laser treatments in case of heart disease.
  - **Post Care**
    - Wear loose clothes for 3-4 days.
    - Avoid direct sun for 3-4 days.
    - Use only normal or lukewarm water for 24 hours. 
    - Apply a moisturizer twice a day for 2 weeks.
    - Avoid alcohol consumption and smoking for 24 hours.
    - Avoid steam bath  swimming for 24 hours.
    - Avoid scrubbing your skin for a week.
    - Use cold compress  fucibet cream in case of redness or itching.

    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peels for atleast 20 days after facial.

- Description:
  - **Product Used**

  - **Procedure**
    - Cleanser: Face is cleansed to remove dirt and impurities.
    - Abrasion with Serum: Deep cleansing to remove impurities from pores.
    - Exfoliation: Exfoliation using peel followed by removal of blackheads  whiteheads using ultrasonic scraper.
    - Massage: Pressure point massage on face to release the tension.
    - Ultrasonic: Waves are given to smoothen skin. 
    - Lactic Peel: Covering sensitive areas with Vaseline followed by lactic peel application for 5-10 minutes. 
    - Cool Stamping: Cooling effect to settle and cool down the skin temperature.
    - Oxyglow: Serum and Vit C tonic penetration by Oxyglow. 
    - LED Mask: Application of Hydra Mask with light therapy for 5 minutes.
    - Vit-C Powder Mask: Rubber mask is applied all over the face  removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - SPF: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
  - **Equipment Used**
    - Abrasion
    - Ultrasonic Scraper
    - Radio Frequency
    - Ultrasonic
    - Cool Stamping
    - Radio Frequency
    - Hydration Mask (LED) 
  - **Pre Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 prior getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours prior getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Do not apply makeup on the day of facial.
    - Avoid heavy meal  alchohol.
  - **Post Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 after getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours after getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Only use a mild cleanser on face.
    - Do not apply makeup for atleast 24 hours post facial.
    - Avoid touching face or washing with hot water.
    - Sweat might cause skin irritation, hence avoid workout post facial.
  - **Precautions**
    - Avoid Hydra Facials if you are pregnant, breast feeding, have teeth braces, had eye surgery or undergone any surgery recently. In such cases consult your doctor before getting hydra facial.
  - **Things to Know**
    - One-time use products will be used.
    - Left over product will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Professional will bring disposables with them to ensure hygiene.

    - Purifying Tonic:  Toner is applied on the face to minimise the pores  hydrate the skin. 
    - Serum: Arbutin serum is absorbed into the skin.
    - Massage: Massage on the face, back  neck with Derma Melan Cream for 10-15 minutes to relax the muscles  release the tension.
    - Arbutin Mask Application:  Powder is mixed with water  a thick pack is applied on the face. After it dries, it is removed as a peel-off mask.
    - SPF: SPF application to protect the skin and enhance the benefits of the facial.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid this facial for sensitive skin.
    - Avoid using bleach with Peel/Detan pack
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly. 
    - Avoid direct sunlight just after the facial.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peel-off for atleast 20 days after facial.
    - Avoid pool bath  hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial and left over products will be handed over.
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - In case you wish to use your own product, please uncheck the product cost. 
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

- Service sub title: Vitamin-C Brightening Clean-Up + Full Arms, Underarms and Full Legs Honey Wax + Eyebrows and Upper Lips Threading
- Gender: FEMALE

- Product cost: 568

- Description:
  - **Rica Waxing**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summers, monsoon  even in winters.
    - Areas with wounds  cuts won't be waxed.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - There might be some redness on the skin post wax which will reside in a few hours.
    - Underarms are done with Stripless Korean Bean Wax.
    - Rica Wax box will not be handed over.
    -  If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - If using your own product, kindly provide pre wax gel  post wax oil else extra Rs. 100/- will be charged.
    - Professionals will provide a waxing kit (10 Wax strips, 5 Wooden spatulas, Pre-wax gel  Post wax oil) and a disposable kit (gown, bedsheet, towels, tissues etc.) to the customers.
  - **Korean Glow Facial**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial  left over products will be handed over.  
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost. 
    - Steam is not included in this facial.
    - Avoid face waxing, chemical exfoliation, laser or carbon peel treatments for atleast 15 days after facial.
    - Avoid bleach/detan with this facial.
