Short description: Ginseng, a K-beauty ingredient, helps achieve glass glow skin by reducing aging signs.
Full details:
Korean Glow Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Korean Glow
- Sub heading: K-Rituals
- Service: Korean Glow Facial
- Service title: Korean Glow Facial
- Service sub title: 9 Steps Facial | Includes FREE silicone facial brush
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Ginseng, a K-beauty ingredient, helps achieve glass glow skin by reducing aging signs.
- Products: korean glow pro facial kit ,Facial Essentials Kit
- Approx time: 75
- Service cost: 450
- Product cost: 849
- Basic total cost: 1299
- Description:
  - **PRODUCTS USED**
    - Glassique Skin Korean Glow Facial Kit Pro from Organica Da Roma by Yes Madam is used in this facial. 
    - This kit consists of mono use cleanser, peel, lip exfoliator, massage gel, massage cream, melting massage candle, cream pack, eye mask  face serum, peel-off powder mask, peel-off gel mask, herbs, SPF  lip balm.
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - All skin types except senstive skin
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Brightens  lightens skin tone. 
    - Improves skin texture.
    - Gives smooth, glowing and clear skin. 
    - Promotes hydrated and healthy skin. 
  - **PROCEDURE**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using brightening face cleanser followed by using facial brush for better cleansing.
    - Face  Lip Exfoliation: Face exfoliation using lightening peel followed by blackhead  whitehead extraction  lip exfoliation using lip softening exfoliator. Use of facial brush for better action.
    - Massage Gel: Face massage for 7-10 minutes using massage gel.
    - Massage Cream: Face  neck massage for 7-10 minutes using massage cream. 
    - Melting Massage Candle: Melted candle wax is massaged over neck  back. (The wax is not to be used on the face  it does not burn the skin.)
    - Cream Pack: Pack application using facial brush for 10-15 minutes.
    - 2-in-1 Eye Mask  Face Serum: Eye mask is applied under the eyes followed by application of leftover serum.
    - Algae Peel-Off Powder, Gel  Herbs: Powder mask, gel mask and herbs are mixed together to make a rubber mask which is then applied all over the face. It is removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - Sunscreen: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
    - Lip Balm: Lip balm application to moisturise lips. 
    - Facial Brush: Handover Professional will handover the facial brush to the customer.
  - **PRECAUTIONS**
    - Avoid using bleach or detan pack with peel.
    - Avoid facial for atleast 15 days, if you've undergone laser hair removal. 
    - Avoid facial if you've taken any chemical peel treatment.
    - Keep atleast 30 days gap between two facial sessions.
    - Avoid face wax for atleast 15 days after the facial.
  - **AFTERCARE TIPS**
    - Keep yourself hydrated  apply SPF regularly.
    - Avoid direct sunlight after facial.
    - Avoid using harsh scrubs or chemical peel for atleast 20 days after facial. 
    - Avoid hot shower for atleast 24 hours.
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - Mono sachets will be used for this facial  left over products will be handed over.  
    - Professionals provide disposable kit with gown, bedsheet, tissues, cotton etc. for hygiene purposes.
    - If you wish to use your own products, kindly uncheck the product cost. 
    - Steam is not included in this facial.

Short description: Deeply hydrates and nourishes skin
Full details:
Insta Collagen Boost HydraGlo Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: HydraGlo Facials
- Sub heading: Hydra Facial
- Service: Insta Collagen Boost HydraGlo Facial - 1 Session
- Service title: Insta Collagen Boost HydraGlo Facial
- Service sub title: Anti-ageing boost in 13 steps
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Deeply hydrates and nourishes skin
- Products: Facial Essentials Kit,Hydra Upgrade Tool,Lactic Peel,ABC Hydra Boost Serum,Hydra Boost Facial
- Approx time: 90
- Service cost: 540
- Product cost: 1459
- Basic total cost: 1999
- Description:
  - **Procedure**
    - Cleansing: Face is cleansed using hydra foaming cleanser to remove dirt and impurities.
    - Abrasion with Cleansing Serum: Deep cleansing to remove impurities from pores.
    - Exfoliation: Face exfoliation using Hydra Boost Scrub followed by blackhead  whitehead removal using ultrasonic scraper. 
    - Radio Frequency with Massage Gel (8 minutes): Massage gel application followed by radio frequency provides mild heat which produces collagen.
    - Massage: Pressure point massage on face to release muscle tension.
    - Galvanic: This is done to reduce face puffiness.
    - Lactic Peel: Covering sensitive areas with Vaseline followed by lactic peel application for 5-10 minutes. 
    - Cool Stamping: Cooling effect to settle and cool down the skin temperature.
    - Oxyglow: Serum and Vit C tonic penetration by Oxyglow. 
    - LED Mask: Application of Hydra Mask with light therapy for 5 minutes.
    - Algae Peel-Off Rubber Mask: Rubber mask is applied all over the face  removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - SPF: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
  - **Equipment Used**
    - Abrasion
    - Ultrasonic Scraper
    - Radio Frequency
    - Galvanic
    - Cool Stamping
    - Oxy Glow
    - Hydration Mask (LED)
  - **Pre Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 prior getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours prior getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Do not apply makeup on the day of facial.
    - Avoid heavy meal  alchohol.
  - **Post Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 after getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours after getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Only use a mild cleanser on face.
    - Do not apply makeup for atleast 24 hours post facial.
    - Avoid touching face or washing with hot water.

  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**

  - **WHY BODY BRIGHTENER?**
    - Body Brightener detoxifies and soothes mind-body- spirit, pampering the body to provide one of the most luxurious, refreshing  relaxing experience.
    - Skin is the mirror, the barometer of one's health, it suffers from premature ageing if neglected and not cared properly and regularly.
    - This treatment restores skin's suppleness and firmness.
    - The massages done during a body brightening treatment help to drain excess fluid and toxin by opening lymphatic pathways and promote blood circulation.
  - **KIT CONTENTS**
    - Step 1: Foot Ritual
    - Step 2: Vanilla Milk Cleanser :- Deeply cleans the impurities from the skin. Good for Normal to Dry skin and Excessive Dry skin.
    - Step 3: Plum Scrub:- antioxidant agent, helps lighten the scars from the body, regulates the blood circulation of the body.
    - Step 4: Green Apple Gel :- Good in hydration, as its active ingredients are aloe vera and papaya enzymes. It also soothes the skin texture and lightens the tan of the skin.
    - Step 5: Pomegranate Serum :- Nourishes the skin and reduces the sensitivity, combats inflammation from acne breakouts.  
    - Step 6: Mango Massage Cream :- As mango is a good source of Vit-C it stops the growth of free radicals, it also retains moisture of the skin.
    - Step 7: Lemon Pack :- Lemons citric property makes it good in lightning scars, reducing tan and clears the impurities from the skin.
    - Step 8: Avocado Body Moisturiser :- helps your skin stay smooth, strong and elastic. Regular use of this moisturiser, calms itchy skin, heals chapped skin, replenishes dry skin. hydrates and moisturizes skin, shields skin from ultraviolet radiation.
    - Step 9: Rose Body Mist
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Oxygenates body's skin from head to toe thus stimulates blood circulation improving skin tone and texture.
    - Enhances growth of new cells by removing dead and dull skin cells.
    - Treats dry, dehydrated and sun-damaged skin.
    - De-stress, relax and rejuvenate the body.

    - Algae Peel-Off Rubber Mask: Rubber mask is applied all over the face  removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - SPF: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
  - **Equipment Used**
    - Abrasion
    - Ultrasonic Scraper
    - Radio Frequency
    - Galvanic
    - Cool Stamping
    - Oxy Glow
    - Hydration Mask (LED)
  - **Pre Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 prior getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours prior getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Do not apply makeup on the day of facial.
    - Avoid heavy meal  alchohol.
  - **Post Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 after getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours after getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Only use a mild cleanser on face.
    - Do not apply makeup for atleast 24 hours post facial.
    - Avoid touching face or washing with hot water.
    - Sweat might cause skin irritation, hence avoid workout post facial.
  - **Precautions**
    - Avoid Hydra Facials if you are pregnant, breast feeding, have teeth braces, had eye surgery or undergone any surgery recently. In such cases consult your doctor before getting hydra facial.
  - **Things to Know**
    - One-time use products will be used.
    - Left over product will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Professional will bring disposables with them to ensure hygiene.

Short description: Authentic Korean ingredients brighten and whiten the skin
Full details:
Stripless Korean Bikini Wax
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: Korean Glow
- Sub heading: K-Rituals
- Service: Stripless Korean Bikini Wax
- Service title: Stripless Korean Bikini Wax
- Service sub title: One-time use peel off wax
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Authentic Korean ingredients brighten and whiten the skin
- Products: Bikini Stripless Korean Bean Wax 80g,Bikini Wax Hygiene Kit
- Approx time: 60
- Service cost: 360
- Product cost: 389
- Basic total cost: 749
- Description:
  - **BRAND**
    - Korean bean wax
  - **RECOMMENDED FOR**
    - Unwanted hair on Bikini area
    - In growth Hair
  - **BENEFITS**
    - Removes superficial tanning
    - Korean bean wax removes unwanted hair from sensitive areas gently
    - Renowned for natural soothing and emollient actions.
    - Korean bean wax is the most hygienic way of waxing 
    - Less painful than strip wax
  - **THINGS TO KNOW**
    - AC is highly recommended for waxing during summer and monsoon.
    - Use of pre-wax gel, after wax lotion and wooden disposable spatula.
    - Korean bean wax is highly recommended on sensitive areas - Bikini areas and Face
    - No cuts, wounds, injury or infection on the area to be waxed.
    - Area to be waxed shouldn't be shaved in the past 3 weeks.
    - Hair should be at least 0.25 inch to be able to wax properly.
    - No previous history of major reaction due to waxing.
    - After waxing, there would be possibility of getting skin redness / hives / inflammation, which subsides in few hours depending on person to person.
    - Use ice if you have redness and bumping
    - Use anti-biotic cream to prevent infection
    - Wear loose and cotton cloth after waxing
    - Avoid hot tubs, hot baths and other chlorinated water for at least 48 hours
    - Shaving is not recommended if you are having Korean bean waxing. Shaving after Korean bean waxing can trigger various skin problems.
    - Sweating can trigger skin problems as after waxing your skin becomes more vulnerable to skin problems. So, you should not attain exercise sessions after getting waxed.
  - **YES MADAM SUGGESTIONS**
    - Sokora bean wax will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your own product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - If using your own product, kindly provide pre wax gel, post wax oil  spatula else extra Rs.100 will be charged.

Short description: Tightens skin and provides instant glow.
Full details:
Hydration Boost HydraGlo Facial
- Category: Salon for Women
- Sub category: HydraGlo Facials
- Sub heading: Hydra Facial
- Service: Hydration Boost HydraGlo Facial - 1 Session
- Service title: Hydration Boost HydraGlo Facial
- Service sub title: Boost skin hydration in 15 steps
- Gender: FEMALE
- Short description: Tightens skin and provides instant glow.
- Products: ABC Hydra Boost Serum,Facial Essentials Kit,Hydra Boost Facial,Hydra Upgrade Tool,Lactic Peel
- Approx time: 90
- Service cost: 540
- Product cost: 1459
- Basic total cost: 1999
- Description:
  - **Products Used**
    - FYC Professional Hydra Boost Facial Kit
  - **Procedure**
    - Cleanser: Face is cleansed using hydra foaming cleanser to remove dirt and impurities.
    - Abrasion with Cleansing Serum: Deep cleansing to remove impurities from pores.
    - Exfoliation: Face exfoliation using Hydra Boost Scrub followed by blackhead  whitehead removal using ultrasonic scraper. 
    - Abrasion: Peneteration of Vitamin C serum (8 minutes)  Vitamin E serum (5 minutes) using Abrasion machine.
    - Detan Cream: Detan cream application.
    - Ultrasonic with Massage Cream: Massage cream application followed by Ultrasonic Waves to boost up blood circulation.
    - Massage: Pressure point massage on face to release the tension.
    - Radio Frequency with Massage Gel (8 minutes): Massage gel application followed by radio frequency provides mild heat which produces collagen.
    - Lactic Peel: Covering sensitive areas with Vaseline followed by lactic peel application for 5-10 minutes. 
    - Cool Stamping: Cooling effect to settle and cool down the skin temperature.
    - Oxyglow: Serum and Vit C tonic penetration by Oxyglow. 
    - LED Mask: Application of Hydra Mask with light therapy for 5 minutes.
    - Algae Peel-Off Rubber Mask: Rubber mask is applied all over the face  removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - SPF: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
  - **Equipment Used**
    - Abrasion
    - Ultrasonic Scraper
    - Ultrasonic
    - Radio Frequency
    - Cool Stamping
    - Oxy Glow
    - Hydration Mask (LED)
  - **Pre Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 prior getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours prior getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Do not apply makeup on the day of facial.
    - Avoid heavy meal  alchohol.
  - **Post Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 after getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours after getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Only use a mild cleanser on face.
    - Do not apply makeup for atleast 24 hours post facial.
    - Avoid touching face or washing with hot water.
    - Sweat might cause skin irritation, hence avoid workout post facial.
  - **Precautions**
    - Avoid Hydra Facials if you are pregnant, breast feeding, have teeth braces, had eye surgery or undergone any surgery recently. In such cases consult your doctor before getting hydra facial.
  - **Things to Know**
    - One-time use products will be used.
    - Left over product will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Professional will bring disposables with them to ensure hygiene.

    - Cleanser: Face is cleansed using hydra foaming cleanser to remove dirt and impurities.
    - Abrasion with Cleansing Serum: Deep cleansing to remove impurities from pores.
    - Exfoliation: Face exfoliation using Hydra Boost Scrub followed by blackhead  whitehead removal using ultrasonic scraper. 
    - Abrasion: Peneteration of Vitamin C serum (8 minutes)  Vitamin E serum (5 minutes) using Abrasion machine.
    - Detan Cream: Detan cream application.
    - Ultrasonic with Massage Cream: Massage cream application followed by Ultrasonic Waves to boost up blood circulation.
    - Massage: Pressure point massage on face to release the tension.
    - Radio Frequency with Massage Gel (8 minutes): Massage gel application followed by radio frequency provides mild heat which produces collagen.
    - Lactic Peel: Covering sensitive areas with Vaseline followed by lactic peel application for 5-10 minutes. 
    - Cool Stamping: Cooling effect to settle and cool down the skin temperature.
    - Oxyglow: Serum and Vit C tonic penetration by Oxyglow. 
    - LED Mask: Application of Hydra Mask with light therapy for 5 minutes.
    - Algae Peel-Off Rubber Mask: Rubber mask is applied all over the face  removed as a peel-off mask after 10 minutes.
    - SPF: Facial is finished off with sunscreen application to protect skin from UV rays /Blue light damage.
  - **Equipment Used**
    - Abrasion
    - Ultrasonic Scraper
    - Ultrasonic
    - Radio Frequency
    - Cool Stamping
    - Oxy Glow
    - Hydration Mask (LED)
  - **Pre Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 prior getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours prior getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Do not apply makeup on the day of facial.
    - Avoid heavy meal  alchohol.
  - **Post Facial Care**
    - Avoid active ingredients like retinol or exfoliants 2-3 after getting facial.
    - Avoid getting threading or waxing 24-48 hours after getting facial.
    - Drink lots of water  keep yourself hydrated.
    - Only use a mild cleanser on face.
    - Do not apply makeup for atleast 24 hours post facial.
    - Avoid touching face or washing with hot water.
    - Sweat might cause skin irritation, hence avoid workout post facial.
  - **Precautions**
    - Avoid Hydra Facials if you are pregnant, breast feeding, have teeth braces, had eye surgery or undergone any surgery recently. In such cases consult your doctor before getting hydra facial.
  - **Things to Know**
    - One-time use products will be used.
    - Left over product will be handed over.
    - If you wish to use your product, kindly uncheck product cost.
    - Professional will bring disposables with them to ensure hygiene.
